# atlassian_jira_screen_tab_field (Resource)

Adds a field to a tab on a Jira Cloud screen. All attributes are immutable; any change forces recreation.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "atlassian_jira_screen_tab_field" "example" {
  screen_id = atlassian_jira_screen.example.id
  tab_id    = atlassian_jira_screen_tab.example.id
  field_id  = "summary"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `field_id` (String) The ID of the field to add to the tab. Changing this forces recreation of the resource.
- `screen_id` (String) The ID of the screen. Changing this forces recreation of the resource.
- `tab_id` (String) The ID of the screen tab. Changing this forces recreation of the resource.
